summary: E-commerce shop app (Shop Central) with product management and phone-number-based login.

existing_features.title: Replace the current Internet Identity login flow with a phone number-only login. The AuthGuard login prompt and LoginButton component must collect only a phone number (no email or password). Store the phone number as the user identifier and use it to authenticate/create a user session in the backend.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add products option for managing/adding products
Login using phone number only (no email/password)

Add an 'Add Product' management option accessible from the navigation header for admin users. This should link to the existing CreateProduct page (or equivalent). Ensure the admin-only Add Product link is visible in both desktop and mobile navigation when the user has admin role.
